methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Rebellion Defense is a SPAC-stage defense and security company founded by Oliver Lewis and Chris Lynch, having raised $150M to date. The broader Defense & Security sector contains 21 peer companies; however, the comparable universe for narrow-band valuation is constrained. Two public comps (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and eight private peers including Anduril Industries, True Anomaly, Scale AI, Saronic, and Flock Safety were identified across the sector.

The peer-median method is not applicable given insufficient same-stage, adjacent-stage, or valuation-tier-aligned comparables. The available set of two same-stage private companies and zero adjacent-stage peers falls below the minimum threshold of three datapoints required for reliable median-based triangulation. An all-sector median approach would conflate heterogeneous business models and growth profiles within Defense & Security, rendering such a calculation misleading rather than instructive.

The current valuation range cannot be responsibly derived from the data provided. Establishing credible estimates would require either (1) expansion of the peer set through additional same-stage or adjacent-stage companies within the defense sector, (2) detailed financial metrics (revenue, growth rates, EBITDA multiples) from the identified public and private comps, or (3) application of alternative methods such as DCF or sum-of-the-parts analysis grounded in specific revenue or unit-economic projections for Rebellion Defense. Key uncertainties include the company's revenue run-rate, customer concentration, and technology differentiation relative to the identified peer set.
